mapper.select: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(s.start_at, '+00:00', '+09:00')) AS date, c.name AS className, SUM(s.capacity) AS totalCapacity, SUM(s.booked_count) AS totalBooked, ROUND(SUM(s.booked_count) / NULLIF(SUM(s.capacity), 0), 4) AS utilizationRate FROM slots s JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.is_active = TRUE AND s.start_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND s.start_at < #{rangeTo} GROUP BY date, c.name ORDER BY date, c.name
